specialist_assignments.rationale: All tasks are code/backend domain. game-backend-engine domain_tags (backend, rest-api, persistence, game-state, immutable-state, typescript, turn-based, rpg) overlap directly with all three tasks: API route wiring, state updater addition, and validation deepening.

execution_order.rationale: Single specialist covers all tasks. Tasks are independent (no cross-task state dependencies at detail phase) and can be addressed sequentially within the specialist's blueprint.
